title: mentha × calamintifolia
intro: Mentha × calamintifolia, also known as peppermint-lemon balm, is a hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of peppermint (Mentha × piperita) and lemon balm (Melissa officinalis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic agent, making it useful for treating digestive issues and headaches. The health benefits of Mentha × calamintifolia include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
